title: BOOYAKA!
description: Fullscreen camo pattern slideshow with complementary color lettering overlay. Procedural camouflage generators (Woodland, Digital, Splinter, Flecktarn, Multicam) based on real military specs. 24 palettes from military to fashion to futuristic, auto-cycling at 0.5s.
license_notes: Camo pattern algorithms based on public military specifications (MARPAT patent US6805957, Flecktarn/Splittertarn public domain).
